resources.name: Concordia Game Development Club Jams
resources.description: Concordia's Game Development Club game jams, with new themes every year.

resources.name: McGameJam
resources.description: Quebec's largest game jam, hosted by McGill University featuring various industry sponsors.

resources.name: Ubisoft Game Lab Competition
resources.description: An intense, 10 week annual game jam where students develop innovative game concepts competing for over 55,000$ in scholarships.

resources.name: Behaviour Interactive Game Jam
resources.description: Game jam hosted by Behaviour Interactive, featuring mentorship and networking opportunities with industry professionals.

resources.name: GAMERella Game Jam
resources.description: An over decade old annual game jam focusing on supporting marginalized game creators and aspiring game makers.

resources.name: TOJam (Toronto Game Jam)
resources.description: One of Canada's longest-running and most celebrated game jams, attracting top-tier student developers and industry professionals.

resources.name: Global Game Jam Vancouver
resources.description: A massive western-Canadian flagship hub for the Global Game Jam heavily backed and mentored by Vancouver's prominent local AAA studios.

resources.name: Algoma Startup GameJam
resources.description: An intensive game jam focused on entrepreneurship, run in direct collaboration with Unity industry trainers.

resources.name: Chillennium Game Jam
resources.description: The largest student-run collegiate game jam in the world, featuring various major industry sponsors.

resources.name: GMTK Game Jam
resources.description: The largest virtual game jam, with projects highlighted to millions of viewers through the creators YouTube channel.

resources.name: GitHub Game Off
resources.description: GitHub's annual month-long game jam celebrating open-source development.
